creator: freebsd@schleifer.org
text:
cbb, cardbus, pccard recognized but no /dev/card created so pccardd will
not run.

dmesg output:

As you can see the cardbus stuff seems to be found:
cbb0: <TI1420 PCI-CardBus Bridge> mem 0xee000000-0xee000fff irq 16 at device 2.0 on pci2
cardbus0: <CardBus bus> on cbb0
pccard0: <16-bit PCCard bus> on cbb0
cbb1: <TI1420 PCI-CardBus Bridge> mem 0xee005000-0xee005fff irq 16 at device 2.1 on pci2
cardbus1: <CardBus bus> on cbb1
pccard1: <16-bit PCCard bus> on cbb1

and it sees my pccard (both at boot or insert after boot):

cardbus1: <network, ethernet> at device 0.0 (no driver attached)

I see pccard{0,1}.cis entries in /dev but no card? entries:

I found the closed pr "kern/74025: cardbus devices detected, but no
/dev/card0 created" which is basically the same issue but there was no
resolution to that.

A google search suggested turning off plug and play but my bios does
have any plug and play options.

How-To-Repeat: problem is consistent every bootup of this hardware.
